supportLevels.supported: Direct implementation exists in at least one backend and has evidence selectors.
supportLevels.partial: A backend supports deterministic inventory or a bounded subset; richer CRUD is routed elsewhere.
supportLevels.host-limited: A real host API is required and the command must report the host requirement.
supportLevels.preserve-only: The skill preserves or inventories the surface without claiming mutation.
supportLevels.planned: The object is part of the canonical Excel ecosystem contract but is not implemented yet.

environmentCompatibilityRule: The environment compatibility fields are the current support state for each backend/environment. They remain authoritative even when the overall supportLevel is host-limited; host-limited means the relevant host must be present, while the per-environment value states whether that host path is supported, partial, preserve-only, planned, not required, or not applicable.

environmentCompatibilityLevels.supported: Works in this backend/environment when its documented host requirements are present.
environmentCompatibilityLevels.partial: This backend/environment supports inventory, planning, artifacts, or a bounded subset, but not full CRUD.
environmentCompatibilityLevels.host-limited: This backend/environment may work only when the required host, tenant, driver, trust setting, or runtime is present; use hostRequirements for the exact condition.
environmentCompatibilityLevels.preserve-only: This backend/environment preserves or inventories the surface without claiming mutation.
environmentCompatibilityLevels.planned: This backend/environment is desired but not implemented yet.
environmentCompatibilityLevels.not-required: This backend/environment is not needed for the current supported route.
environmentCompatibilityLevels.not-applicable: This backend/environment does not expose a meaningful route for this surface.

closureReasons.public-api-supported: A documented public or repo-local route exists for the stated lane, with implementation and evidence selectors.
closureReasons.host-api-required: The safe mutation/readback route requires a live Excel, Office, or add-in host and is gated by host requirements.
closureReasons.preserve-only-opaque: The package surface is opaque or signature-sensitive; the skill inventories and preserves it without mutation.
closureReasons.tenant-policy-required: The route depends on Microsoft 365 tenant policy, workspace, label, token, or cloud resource configuration.
closureReasons.no-public-mutation-api: No safe documented public mutation API is available for the workbook surface; inventory/preservation is the final supported behavior.
